bestText: Tired of dates who ghost you after one coffee? ☕ Your Venus in Scorpio needs someone who can handle intensity, not run from it. 🔥

rules.instruction: Use short sentences mixed with longer ones for rhythm
Start with a question or bold claim, never 'I' or 'We'
End with something the reader wants to reply to
Take an opinionated stance, don't hedge
Reference a real dating scenario, not abstract concepts
Use one unexpected comparison or metaphor
Reference a specific planet placement (Venus in Scorpio, etc.)
Mention a specific dating scenario (first date, texting, ghosting)
Ask a rhetorical question that hits home
Use a dash — for dramatic pauses
